prompt:
REDESIGN this Muha Meds giveaway poster (REFERENCE 1) using the SAME modern editorial design language as REFERENCE 2 (the approved Muha Members Giveaway redesign). Match REFERENCE 2's: deep midnight-black background with red/gold/cream palette (NO green neon), muted Miami-at-night cityscape, wet asphalt foreground catching cinematic red/amber reflections, hero red Challenger SRT (TorRed/Octane Red, no stripes/decals), large polished gold Muha 'M' logo, modern display typography (clean white/cream ink with subtle red/amber outer glow), gold polished star icons, cinematic vignette + subtle film grain, premium magazine-cover finish.

COPY TEXT TO PRESERVE EXACTLY: '1 DAY LEFT' as the main hero headline, 'LAST CHANCE TO ENTER' as the smaller subhead below. FIVE stars at the top: ONE filled in polished gold, FOUR unfilled (outline-only). Muha 'M' logo present.

SUBTEXT LOCK (must be IDENTICAL across all five countdown posters — 1/2/3/4/5 day): the subhead line ('LAST CHANCE TO ENTER') is rendered in a clean modern bold sans-serif, ALL CAPS, slightly condensed, generous-but-tight letter-spacing, color is warm cream-white (#F2EAD8-ish) with a subtle red/amber outer glow. Sized at approximately 30 percent of the width of the main headline above it. Crisp clean edges, NO 3D bevel, NO graffiti distress, NO outline-only treatment. Centered horizontally below the headline, sitting on the same horizontal axis as the other countdown posters.

The Challenger SRT is solid red, photorealistic. Aspect ratio 3:4, 2160×2880 / 4K, no extra text, no watermarks.
